name: Alabaster Guardian
rules_text: H:4 A:2 HP:16 L:1 Moves 2. Cast on friendly recruit group not in a struc- ture. Creates Alabaster Guardian in a random adjacent square. Alaba- ster Guardian is player-controlled when in the 3x3 diamond centered on target group. Otherwise, it seeks target group. When target group dies, or is dispelled, Alabaster Guardian becomes player-controlled. Only one on a group.
